description: You are an astrophotographer planning to shoot the rare lunar occultation of Mars from the Griffith Observatory in Los Angeles (34.118° N, 118.300° W, 346 m). Capture high-magnification screenshots of the Mars ingress on December 8, 2022, at 02:30 UTC and the egress at 03:30 UTC. The framing should simulate a clear telescopic view using an equatorial grid and excluding atmospheric and ground elements. Save the screenshots to ~/Pictures/stellarium/ and document the observation plan in /home/ga/Desktop/occultation_plan.txt using the keywords 'Griffith', '02:30', and '03:30'.

metadata.data_source: NASA JPL Horizons ephemeris for Mars/Moon
